calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-19-2025 Continued To Dec-07-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's unopposed Motion for Leave to File Cross-Complaint is GRANTED.

Leave to file a cross-complaint "may be granted in the interest of justice at any time during the course of the action." (Code of Civil Procedure section 428.50(c).) "A motion to file a cross-complaint at any time during the course of the action must be granted unless bad faith of the moving party is demonstrated where forfeiture would otherwise result. Factors such as oversight, inadvertence, neglect, mistake or other cause, are insufficient grounds to deny the motion unless accompanied by bad faith." (Silver Organizations Ltd. v. Frank (1990) 217 Cal.App.3d 94, 99.)

Good cause appearing, the court grants CCSF leave to file the proposed cross-complaint. Cross-Defendant must file its cross-complaint, substantially identical to Exhibit A to the Wiener Declaration, within ten days of entry of this order.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
